SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (İstanbul) - O parmağını kırmak zorunda...

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Yazık! Yazık!

BAŞKAN - Ne söyleyeceğim, bir durun, bir izin verin.

CEMAL ENGİNYURT (İstanbul) - Artistlik yapıyor, artistlik! Artistlik yapıyor! El hareketiyle "sahipsiz köpek" diyor!

BAŞKAN - Sayın Yenişehirlioğlu, sizin konuşmanızda sesinizi yükselttiğinizde el işaretinizle bir yanlış anlaşılma oldu zannedersem. Kastınız nedir, bir anlatır mısınız.

(CHP ve DEM PARTİ sıralarından gürültüler, sıra kapaklarına vurmalar)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - "Sahipsiz hayvan" lafını sana iade ediyorum! "Sahipsiz köpek" lafını sana iade ediyorum! Terbiyesiz!

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (İstanbul) - Özür dilesin! Özür dilesin!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Benim için...

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (İstanbul) - Özür dilesin!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Açıklayayım.

BAŞKAN - Evet, bir izin verin, anlatsın ne dediğini.

HASAN ÖZTÜRKMEN (Gaziantep) - Sahipsiz köpekler cemaat yurtlarında!

BAŞKAN - Sayın Yenişehirlioğlu, buyurun.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Estağfurullah.

Benim için...

HASAN ÖZTÜRKMEN (Gaziantep) - Sahipsiz köpekler cemaat yurtlarında, tarikat yurtlarında!

BAŞKAN - Ya, bir izin verin değerli milletvekilleri, bir izin verin... Hatibi lütfen dinleyin. Süreyi tutalım. Hatibi dinleyelim lütfen.

Sayın Yenişehirlioğlu, lütfen...

(CHP ve DEM PARTİ sıralarından gürültüler, sıra kapaklarına vurmalar)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Saraya biat eden köle değiliz en azından! Saraya biat eden köleler!

BAŞKAN - İzin verin değerli arkadaşlar, bir konuşsun, anlatsın meramını, izin verin.

Evet, Sayın Yenişehirlioğlu, siz buyurun.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Benim için, benim gibi düşünmemiş olsa bile...

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Sizinkisi düşünmek değil, sizinkisi halk düşmanlığı! Halk düşmanlığı yapıyorsunuz!

BAŞKAN - Bir izin verin... Bir izin verin!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - ...karşımda konuşmamı yaptığım bütün milletvekilleri değerli, anlamlı ve önemlidir. Ben kimseyi kastetmiyorum. (CHP ve DEM PARTİ sıralarından gürültüler, sürekli sıra kapaklarına vurmalar)

CEMAL ENGİNYURT (İstanbul) - Niye işaret ediyorsun o zaman! Niye "sahipsiz köpekler!" diye işaret ediyorsun!

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Her zaman bunu yapıyorsunuz! Hadi oradan! Sonra keseceksin, buna göstereceksin videoları.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Her birinizin değerli ve anlamlı milletvekilleri olduğunu düşünüyorum. (CHP ve DEM PARTİ sıralarından gürültüler, sürekli sıra kapaklarına vurmalar)

(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)

BAŞKAN - Sayın Yenişehirlioğlu, lütfen tamamlayın.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Hakaret köpek olmak değildir, AKP'li olmaktır, AKP'li!

ALİ ÖZTUNÇ (Kahramanmaraş) - Bu Mecliste hiç kimse milletvekilleriyle böyle konuşamaz! Sayın Başkan, konuşturma!

BAŞKAN - Sayın Yenişehirlioğlu, buyurun, siz Genel Kurula hitap edin.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; mevcut kanunun, sahipsiz hayvanların rahat yaşamını ve can güvenliğini sağlayamadığı gibi, insanların ve diğer canlıların yaşadıkları sorunları çözmekte çaresiz kaldığı ortadadır. (CHP ve DEM PARTİ sıralarından gürültüler, sıra kapaklarına vurmalar)

ALİ ÖZTUNÇ (Kahramanmaraş) - Sayın Başkan, konuşturamazsın! Sayın Bozdağ!

HAKKI SARUHAN OLUÇ (Antalya) - Ayıp, ayıp! Ayıp diye bir şey var! Utanmak diye bir şey var! Ayıp ya! Yakışıyor mu size, çok ayıp ya!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Hâlihazırda popülasyon kontrolünde kısırlaştırma yöntemi uygulansa da köpeklerin yıl içerisinde 1-2 defa doğum yapabilmesi, her defasında ortalama 6-8 yavru doğurması ve gün içerisinde aktif olarak yer değiştirmeleri sebebiyle popülasyon kontrolünde kısırlaştırma yöntemi...(AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar; CHP ve DEM PARTİ sıralarından gürültüler, sürekli sıra kapaklarına vurmalar)

(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Ayıp, ayıp! Yeter! Yeter, otur artık! Yeter!

BAŞKAN - Sayın Yenişehirlioğlu, teşekkür ediyorum.

Süreniz doldu, teşekkür ediyorum.

ALİ ÖZTUNÇ (Kahramanmaraş) - Aynısını biz de yaparız Başkan sana, aynısını!

BAŞKAN - Sayın Kılıç Koçyiğit, size de söz vereceğim, bir dakika...
records.englishTranslation:
ON BEHALF OF THE AK PARTY GROUP BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Manisa) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I have taken the floor on behalf of the AK Party Group on our Bill on Amendments to the Animal Protection Law. I respectfully salute the General Assembly and our beloved nation.

Mr. President, dear MPs; Türkiye has reached today by following the compass of its ancient culture and belief system; He overcame every obstacle he encountered with the power of mercy, and he accounted for and solved every problem that came his way with the meticulousness of a moneychanger; It has always been a compass of mercy both regionally and internationally, protected the stronghold of conscience, and has always been envied thanks to the regulations it has implemented to protect the interests of humanity. Our state has accepted its glorious past as a reference point, fixed one foot on this point like a compass, but has pursued continuous development and development with the other foot.

Mr. President, dear MPs; We all know that those who do not know their past cannot direct their future. Our thousands of years of deep-rooted state culture, civilization codes and supreme religion have advised us to be compassionate, to act as a whole with the environment we live in, and to protect both people and the environment. However, the basic principle that should not be forgotten here is the measure. Unfortunately, when the measure is lost, control is lost, and the setting is disturbed, it is possible to see that pictures of hope turn into pictures of colorless and soulless pessimism. "Even happiness turns into torment if it exceeds its limits and gets out of control." The word actually tells us about this measurement principle. As representatives of a civilization that adds elegance to history in the lands under its sovereignty and reigns with the understanding of dispensing justice to the world, our responsibility is great, and the road for all of us is bumpy.

Mr. President, dear MPs; These lands, honored with Islam, have been the source of mercy for thousands of years, have drawn conscientious directions to those who have lost their way in the spiritual sense, and brought those who have lost their way back to the line of morality. Only the Holy Quran, which is the holy book, has illuminated the path of humanity in times when humanity was sanctified, individuality was prioritized, selfishness shook social dynamics, and violence and chaos were rampant. In order to escape from such chaos, our Beloved Prophet was assigned to bring light to the darkness of the period and served as a host to a lost order. The key of faith that opens the locked doors of the spiritual world; He became the architect of a social consciousness that is us-oriented, not self-centered, and placed conscience and compassion on the main axis of the ideal of a perfect society. We are the representatives of an ideology that has adopted the motto of continuing on its path by preserving the main idea, building on it and developing this awareness, without allowing any reduction or distortion, breakage or narrowing.

(Humming)

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, can I have a minute of your time?

Dear MPs, there is a really big noise in the General Assembly, let's please listen to the esteemed speaker with respect. It would be more beneficial if we had conversations in a voice that would not cause any humming.

Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, here you go.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; our beloved nation and ancient state; Throughout history, it has always cared for animals and carried the flag of mercy in a time when animals were slaughtered through witch hunts. When we embark on a historical journey, it will be clearly seen that we are a nation that has protected our vision of civilization throughout history. Think of an empire; when creating its architecture, it should design birdhouses and think about the life of birds in the region. In which civilization in the world do we see such an element of elegance?

MURAT EMİR (Ankara) - From where to where, understand!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - We all know the cat father Abu Huraira. One day, while Abu Hurayra was sitting and chatting with his students, he knelt down on the ground and spread his jalabiya, so as not to disturb the sleep of the kitten that came to the end of his cellabiya, and he had only one cellabiya...

SİBEL SUİÇMEZ (Trabzon) - Animals...

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - ...with the pocket knife he took out of his pocket, dear Sibel cut off his cellabiye and made it a motto not to torture him, and after chatting, he left the cat there and continued on his way, because he saw waking the cat as cruelty.

ÇİÇEK OTLU (Istanbul) - We want the same elegance for stray dogs.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - Once upon a time, while a friend of God was traveling with his students, they stopped somewhere in the field to perform the noon prayer, the call to prayer was recited, they performed their prayers and then continued on their way. He sees many ants on him saying, "I took these away from their mother, father, and homeland." Saying this, he walked back for miles on that hot day, found the nest, and shook the ants back to where they were.

RIDVAN UZ (Çanakkale) - Tell this to those who brought the law!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - When we look at our foundation civilization, we see that foundations were established in our history to protect animals, treat animals, and take care of migrating birds. At a time when Westerners were slaughtering each other in endless religious wars, our civilization, for example, was treating migrating storks, as well as all animals, by establishing the "Gurabahane-i Laklakan", that is, the house of fond storks. When you examine the foundation certificates of the period...

RIDVAN UZ (Çanakkale) - First of all, follow your ancestors then. Follow your ancestors, your ancestors!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - ...Since the pack animals were overloaded in Istanbul, the foundation officials were obliged to reduce the load on the animals in order not to torture them. There were foundation employees who cleaned the troughs under the fountains and sterilized them with lime so that the animals could drink clean water. We are proud to be the ummah of a Prophet who changed the path of his army so that a dog nursing its puppies would not be disturbed. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

ÇİÇEK OTLU (Istanbul) - Then why are you spoiling it? We expect you to do the same. This animal wants to live on the street.

ŞENGÜL KARSLI (Istanbul) - What are you shouting!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - Compassion and mercy have always been magnified in these lands where the subtle humanity is Islam. As can be seen in very valuable examples, we never need to take lessons in compassion, emulate or be inspired by any idea, because it is the tradition of which we are members and representatives that brings this world together with compassion. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) Allah has described man as the most honorable of creations. "Keep people alive so that the state can live." This motto has been the pillar of our ancient culture. We are aware of our responsibility as workers of a blessed idea that encompasses not a certain group or group of living beings but the entire universe, and we act accordingly.

Mr. President, dear MPs; AK PARTY governments have undertaken very important work to ensure the welfare of animals, as in every field, with the necessary and needed legal regulations and practices. However, despite all the work carried out with good intentions, we see that due to the fact that the population of stray and homeless dogs has not been controlled in recent years, this issue has seriously occupied the country's agenda and has become a problem that we all accept.

The Animal Protection Law No. 5199 was adopted in 2004 in order to ensure that animals live comfortably in our country, that animals are treated well and appropriately, that they are protected in the best way possible against pain and suffering, and that all kinds of victimization are prevented. In 2021, some changes were made to Law No. 5199, thus removing the status of animals from property and taking them to the status of life. In this regard, crimes committed against animals were defined and prison sentences were introduced, and administrative fines for other misdemeanors were increased.

We all know that, in the current and developing process, this law - as I have just mentioned - cannot fully ensure the comfortable life and life safety of stray dogs, and it is a fact that everyone agrees on that it is insufficient to solve the problems experienced by humans and other living creatures. In this regard, experts on the subject of stray and homeless dogs, academics, non-governmental organizations, politicians...

ÖMER FETHI GÜRER (Niğde) - There was no Chamber of Veterinarians, there were no associations.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - ...our citizens and their families who were victims of the dog attack had completed the reporting process by meeting with many different segments of the society such as animal lovers, artists, press members and opinion leaders.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Which experts were interviewed, Mr. Bahadır? Who talked to these experts? There were also AKP MPs.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continue) - Now, dear MPs, the people I met with, the organizations I met with during this process... (Noise from the DEM PARTY benches)

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu...

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - I understand you, I respect you.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - We do not understand you.

ÇİÇEK OTLU (Istanbul) - Well, we are trying to understand you.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - Please, I am saying this to answer the question you asked.

ÇİÇEK OTLU (Istanbul) - Yes, we are waiting.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - My conversations with the people I mentioned here are "Words fly, words remain." with the thought of...

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Words come out of your mouth once.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Publish it so we can know. Look, with the public...

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continue) - Allow me to make my statement and complete it. (Noise from DEM PARTY rows)

I asked them to send me all of these conversations with the idea that "Words fly, only writing remains."

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Please publish; I request you to publish it! Please publish!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - I presented the files I prepared and the list of names of all the people and institutions I interviewed to the Chairman of the Commission, which includes representatives of all parties, the opposition and the government; Which of you kindly took a look? (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - The law has come, you just listened and passed it; That's how it went.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Oh, you haven't read the investigation commission report we wrote. Didn't you read the commission report written by 11 AKP MPs, not me?

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - We did not do anything secret or secret. (Noise from DEM PARTY rows)

If you know the people I interviewed in the folders I submitted to the Commission President...

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - You are doing something on a subject that you do not understand at all, but it does not work when it is handled with elegance?

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - ...if you were curious about the institutions, artists, journalists, victim families, academics, you would be kind enough to open it and take a look at the list. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You did not pay attention, take it into consideration!

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Who are they; who, who? Which academics? You have not read the investigation commission report of this Parliament... (Noise from DEM PARTY benches)

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - When examined in general terms, the stray dog problem has reached an inextricable point and has brought about a process where action must be taken.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - You didn't listen to your own representatives! You have eaten Mustafa Yel! You screwed Serap Yaşar!

İSMET GÜNEŞHAN (Çanakkale) - Which commission did you give it to? I think the commissions got mixed up!

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, let me ask for a minute of your time. Let's keep the time.

Dear MPs, valuable orators have just spoken, they were all listened to with respect, Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu is also explaining his own views and the views of his group, please let's listen with respect. There will be other people who will speak anyway, and answers will be given there too.

İSMET GÜNEŞHAN (Çanakkale) - Chairman, "We gave it to the members of the commission." He says, he did not give it to CHP. No, "We didn't." They say here, "We didn't buy it." they say.

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, please come.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - Stray, homeless dogs have become a growing problem in recent years due to the inability to control the population.

ÇİÇEK OTLU (Istanbul) - You have been in power for twenty-two years, you should have implemented 5199.

İSMET GÜNEŞHAN (Çanakkale) - Why haven't you taken it under control until now? Who was holding you?

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - Stray dogs, whose numbers increase day by day and begin to live in herds on the streets, have reached a level that threatens even the most basic human right, the right to life.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Because of AKP!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - At the same time, this uncontrolled proliferation endangers environmental cleanliness, public health, public order and security, and the life and existence of other animals, and the population continues to increase exponentially day by day.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Because of whom, Mr. President?

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continue) - Although well-intentioned attempts are made to protect animals, disinformation activities are carried out against institutions, organizations and individuals trying to take precautions through uncontrolled donation campaigns, especially in the digital environment, through homeless animals and the propaganda of the organizations fed from them. Judicial and administrative investigations on this matter continue as they are. Aside from controlling the number of stray dogs, it is observed that some circles support the uncontrolled increase in stray animals.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - There is a problem of stray murderers in this country; they're all on the street!

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - If only AKP was in power, it would solve it! I wish AKP was in power!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - This situation allows donations made in good faith to be used for uncertain and illegal purposes, and population control efforts are disrupted. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Why didn't you prevent it, who was the government? Have you come to power now?

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Right! I wish you were there and fixed everything!

SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - Bravo! You haven't been able to do anything for twenty-two years, bravo!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - Failure to keep the stray dog population under control...

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - By whom?

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continue) - ...and due to its uncontrolled increase, various risks arise.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Because of whom?

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continue) - The current homeless animal problem has different dimensions. As a result of the increase in the number of stray animals in a region, the physical integrity, life safety and living standards of the people living there are endangered. According to the data of the General Directorate of Security, there were 3,534 traffic accidents in the form of hitting animals between 2019 and 2023.

RIDVAN UZ (Çanakkale) - They are foxes, my President.

MEHMET SATUK BUĞRA KAVUNCU (Istanbul) - There is also sheep in it.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continue) -... and as a result, 55 deaths and 5,147 injuries occurred.

SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - I wish you had taken precautions.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - Due to the density of the stray animal population, the social life of citizens is restricted, which will cause negative psychological consequences. In addition, feeding stray animals in public spaces causes verbal or physical arguments between citizens, which increases social tension.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Are you talking about the women who were beaten for the new article?

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - The news and images reflected in the media of people injured and killed as a result of a stray dog ​​attack cause outrage in the society and this leads to a decrease in trust in public institutions.

SERKAN SARI (Balıkesir) - That's right, you haven't been able to solve it for twenty years, you've been massacring it.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - Reaching an uncontrollable point...

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Not the one who reaches, but the one who is delivered; Delivered by AKP without checking!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - ...due to the homeless dog population, increasing attacks, rabies cases and zoonotic diseases cause material and moral losses.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You are showing the risk of rabies contact as a "case", not a case of rabies.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - This situation results in violations of human rights such as health, security, right to life, protection of material wealth and physical integrity, which are protected by the Constitution. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Because of you, because of AKP, because of unqualified politicians, because of stray politicians, because of AKP members who do not do their job, because of theater actors who think that they hide the fact that they do not do their job with their diction! I think it's because of these!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - Stray animals cause financial losses by attacking farm animals with economic value such as sheep, goats, cows, calves and chickens. (Applause from the ranks of the AK Party) In addition, our country is in the category of countries with high risk of rabies contact published by the World Health Organization.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - That is the old report, you will reference the new one. That report in 2002, another in 2024.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You are distorting the data of the World Health Organization.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continue) - According to the data of the Ministry of Health, while the average number of contacts with rabies risk was 267 thousand 125 between 2018 and 2022, this number was determined to be 437 thousand 601 in 2023.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - Yes, this is the number of contacts; The number of rabies cases is 2. The number of rabies announced by the Ministry of Health in 2024 is 2.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - Foreign countries warn their citizens who will go to Türkiye about aggressive, stray dog gangs and the risk of rabies.

SEVDA KARACA DEMİR (Gaziantep) - No scientific data confirms what you say, you are clearly distorting the data!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - This issue creates a negative impression regarding the reputation of our country, where tourism revenues are an important item. Stray dogs...

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - Look, don't do that! You are the stray animal and you are the stray dog! Bad manners!

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - I'll take that finger of yours! You can't point fingers at that "stray dog"! Irreverent!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - ...while struggling to survive in very harsh conditions, they cause damage to both their own species and other wild animals such as gazelles and roe deer, as well as nature. (Applause from the AK PARTY rows; noises and banging on the desk covers from the CHP and DEM PARTY rows)

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - This is not true! You say "stray dogs"!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - I'm not doing it, what am I doing? I'm reading my text!

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - You are a liar! You are a liar!

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - You are the homeless animal! You are the stray dog! Bad manners! Stray animal! What rudeness is this! Shame, shame! Stray dog! Stray animal! Who are you talking to! Bad manners! Stray animal!

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - This is not true! No, you come back here, you say it! You're coming back here! No! Apologize!

(Knocking on desk covers from CHP and DEM PARTY rows)

CEMAL ENGİNYURT (Istanbul) - Who is he referring to as "stray dog"? Who does he call "stray dog"? Who does he call "stray dog"?

CHAIRMAN - Dear MPs, give me permission... Give me permission...

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - You are being rude! No, no! Mr. President...

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Basarir, give me permission.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - He has to break his finger...

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - What a shame! What a pity!

CHAIRMAN - What can I say, wait a minute, give me permission.

CEMAL ENGİNYURT (Istanbul) - He is an artist, an artist! He's being an artist! He says "stray dog" with a hand gesture!

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, I think there was a misunderstanding with your hand signal when you raised your voice in your speech. What is your intention? Can you please tell me?

(Noise from CHP and DEM PARTY desks, banging on desk covers)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - I return the phrase "stray animal" to you! I return the phrase "stray dog" to you! Ill mannered!

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - He should apologize! Apologize!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - For me...

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - He should apologize!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - Let me explain.

CHAIRMAN - Yes, let him explain what he said.

HASAN ÖZTÜRKMEN (Gaziantep) - Stray dogs in community dormitories!

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, come on.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continue) - Astagfurullah.

For me...

HASAN ÖZTÜRKMEN (Gaziantep) - Stray dogs in community dormitories, sect dormitories!

CHAIRMAN - Oh, give me permission, dear MPs, give me permission... Please listen to the preacher. Let's keep the time. Let's listen to the preacher, please.

Dear Yenişehirlioğlu, please...

(Noise from CHP and DEM PARTY desks, banging on desk covers)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - At least we are not slaves who swear allegiance to the palace! Slaves who swear allegiance to the palace!

CHAIRMAN - Let him speak, let him explain his point, dear friends.

Yes, Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, you are welcome.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - For me, even if he didn't think like me...

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Yours is not thinking, yours is hostility to the people! You are an enemy of the people!

CHAIRMAN - Give me permission... Give me permission!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - ...all the MPs with whom I spoke before are valuable, meaningful and important. I don't mean anyone. (Noise from CHP and DEM PARTY desks, constant banging on desk covers)

CEMAL ENGINYURT (Istanbul) - Then why are you pointing? Why "stray dogs!" you point out!

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You always do this! Come on from there! Then you will cut the videos and show them.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - I think each of you are valuable and meaningful MPs. (Noise from CHP and DEM PARTY desks, constant banging on desk covers)

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, please complete.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Insulting is not being a dog, it is being an AKP member, an AKP member!

ALİ ÖZTUNÇ (Kahramanmaraş) - No one in this Parliament can talk to MPs like this! Mr. President, don't make him talk!

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, please address the General Assembly.

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; It is obvious that the current law cannot ensure the comfortable life and safety of stray animals, and is helpless in solving the problems experienced by humans and other living creatures. (Noise from CHP and DEM PARTY desks, banging on desk covers)

ALİ ÖZTUNÇ (Kahramanmaraş) - Mr. President, you cannot make him talk! Mr. Bozdag!

HAKKI SARUHAN OLUÇ (Antalya) - Shame, shame! There is such a thing as shame! There is such a thing as shame! What a shame! Does it suit you? It's such a shame!

BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continue) - Although the sterilization method is currently used in population control, the sterilization method is used in population control because dogs can give birth 1-2 times a year, give birth to an average of 6-8 puppies each time and actively move during the day... (Applause from the AK PARTY rows; noise from the CHP and DEM PARTY rows, constant banging on the desk covers)

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - Shame, shame! Enough! That's enough, sit down! Enough!

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, thank you.

Your time is up, thank you.

ALİ ÖZTUNÇ (Kahramanmaraş) - We will do the same to you, President!

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Kılıç Koçyiğit, I will give you my word too, wait a minute...

records.originalTurkish:
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Manisa) - Sayın Başkan, değerli...
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Şimdi gelin buraya...
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Tehditlerle yürümez bu Meclis, lütfen...
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Tehdit, tehdit?
SEZAİ TEMELLİ (Muş) - İç Tüzük'ün gereği tehdit olur mu hiç?
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Hayır, hayır, arkadan gelen, sana demiyorum.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - İç Tüzük'teki bir hak tehdit olmaz.
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Yani arkadan gelen söz dolayısıyla diyorum.
Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; hazır söz hakkı gelmişken şunu belirtmemde fayda var: O gün hadiseyi ortaya koyamamıştım ama beni de derinden sarsan bir hadiseydi malumunuz. Saadet Partisi Kocaeli Milletvekili Hasan Bitmez'i vefatının yıl dönümünde ben de rahmetle yâd ediyorum. Ailesine, yakınlarına ve Saadet Partisi camiasına bir kez daha başsağlığı diliyorum.
Bu dünyada kalp kırmak, yara açmak çok kolay malumunuz; bunu hepiniz de çok iyi biliyorsunuz. Önemli olan gönüller yapmak ve yara sarmaktır; esas şiarımızın bu olması gerektiğini düşünüyorum. Bu sebeple, tabii ki tartışacağız, fikirlerimizi öne süreceğiz
ancak ölümlü, gelip geçici bu dünyada birbirimizi kırmanın, üzmenin hiçbir anlamı yok. Bu doğrultuda çalışmalarımızı şekillendirmemiz gerektiğine inancımı bir kez daha tekrar ediyorum. Bu vesileyle, Meclisimizin mehabetine uygun tartışmaların sakin, doğru ve nazik bir üslupla yürütülmesi gerektiğinin önemini bir kez daha vurguluyorum. Merhum Hasan Bitmez'i de bir kez daha rahmetle yâd ediyorum. Genel Kurula da bu sebeple tekrardan saygıyla sunuyorum.
Biz lehte söz aldık ve Meclis Başkan Vekilimizin tutumuna aynen katıldığımızı ifade etmek istiyoruz. İç Tüzük'te olmayan bir hadiseyi sanki bir anayasaymış gibi ortaya koymanın ve daimi olarak tekrarlıyor olmanın doğru olmadığını düşünüyorum.
ERHAN USTA (Samsun) - Bahadır Bey, yasaklayıcı bir hüküm var mı?
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Devamla) - Bütçe görüşmelerinde bütün partilere yetmiş dakika söz veriliyor, yetmiş dakikalık süre zarfında bir muhalefet partisinin ya da iktidar partisinin kendini ifade etmesi, bakanlara karşı tavrını ortaya koyması, sorularını yöneltmesi ve cevap alması son derece uygun bir süre malumunuz. Kaldı ki şunu da doğru bulmuyorum: Bakanlara göre farklı hareket ediliyor ve farklı tutum sergileniyor durumunu Meclis Başkan Vekilimize karşı doğru olmayan bir tavır olarak nitelendiriyorum. Herkesin bir sözü vardır ve bu sözü sarf eder. Bakanlarımız buradadır, her gün değişiyor ve herkes istediği soruyu soruyor ama yoklama isteriz, şunu yaparız, bunu yaparız... Yoklama isterseniz AK PARTİ sıraları dolar ve gereği yapılır ama bu şekilde tehditvari hareketlerle bu Meclis yönetilemez diyorum, hepinize saygılarımı sunuyorum. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Manisa) - Mr. President, dear...
İLHAMİ ÖZCAN AYGUN (Tekirdağ) - Come here now...
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - This Parliament cannot work with threats, please...
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Threat, threat?
SEZAİ TEMELLİ (Muş) - Is there any threat as required by the Internal Regulations?
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - No, no, I'm not telling you the one coming from behind.
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - A right in the Internal Regulations is not a threat.
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continuing) - I mean it because of the words coming from behind.
Mr. President, dear MPs; While I have the right to speak, it would be useful to point out this: I could not reveal the incident that day, but as you know, it was an incident that shook me deeply. I remember Saadet Party Kocaeli Deputy Hasan Bitmez with mercy on the anniversary of his death. Once again, I offer my condolences to his family, relatives and the Saadet Party community.
As you know, it is very easy to break hearts and open wounds in this world; You all know this very well. The important thing is to make hearts and heal wounds; I think this should be our main motto. For this reason, of course we will discuss and put forward our ideas.
However, there is no point in hurting or upsetting each other in this mortal, temporary world. I reiterate once again my belief that we should shape our work in this direction. On this occasion, I emphasize once again the importance of conducting discussions in a calm, correct and courteous manner, in line with the love of our Assembly. I once again remember the late Hasan Bitmez with mercy. For this reason, I respectfully present it to the General Assembly once again.
We spoke in favor and would like to express that we fully agree with the attitude of our Deputy Speaker. I think it is not right to present an event that is not in the Internal Regulation as if it were a constitution and to constantly repeat it.
ERHAN USTA (Samsun) - Mr. Bahadır, is there a prohibitive provision?
BAHADIR NAHİT YENİŞEHİRLİOĞLU (Continued) - All parties are promised seventy minutes during the budget negotiations. As you know, seventy minutes is a very appropriate time for an opposition party or the ruling party to express itself, reveal its attitude towards the ministers, ask its questions and receive answers. Moreover, I do not find this right: I describe the situation of acting differently and exhibiting a different attitude compared to ministers as an incorrect attitude towards our Deputy Speaker of the Parliament. Everyone has something to say and they say it. Our ministers are here, they change every day and everyone asks the question they want, but we ask for a roll call, we do this, we do that... If you want a roll call, the AK PARTY benches will be filled and the necessary action will be taken, but I say that this Parliament cannot be governed with such threatening actions, I offer my respects to all of you. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
